headline: Ford Stock in 10 Years: Where Will It Be?
summary: Surprisingly, the share price for this well-known Detroit car company has fallen 3% over the past decade.

headline: The Pentagon wants GM, Ford to build weapons and bombs — here’s what happened last time during World War II
summary: Automakers could help build weapons as U.S. supplies run low, but a World War II-style industrial shift may be more challenging to pull off today.
